title: Senior Engineer (Full Stack & Infra) - AI Adoption
company_focus: AI and tech upskilling apprenticeship platform
description:
Multiverse is the upskilling platform for AI and Tech
adoption.

We have partnered with 1,500+ companies to deliver a new
kind of learning that's transforming today’s workforce.

Our upskilling apprenticeships are designed for people of
any age and career stage to build critical AI, data, and
tech skills. Our learners have driven $2bn+ ROI for their
employers, using the skills they’ve learned to improve
productivity and measurable performance.

In June 2022, we announced a $220 million Series D funding
round co-led by StepStone Group, Lightspeed Venture Partners
and General Catalyst. With a post-money valuation of $1.7bn,
the round makes us the UK’s first EdTech unicorn.

But we aren’t stopping there. With a strong operational
footprint and 800+ employees, we have ambitious plans to
continue scaling. We’re building a world where tech skills
unlock people’s potential and output.  Join Multiverse and
power our mission to equip the workforce to win in the AI
era.

The Mission & The Squad

Multiverse is the upskilling platform for AI and Tech
adoption. We have partnered with 1,500+ companies to deliver
a new kind of learning that's transforming today’s
workforce. Having built a thriving apprenticeship business,
we are now doubling down on our AI strategy with the launch
of a groundbreaking AI Adoption Platform.

You will join the Adoption AI Team, a small foundational
squad operating as a "startup" within Multiverse. We are
building a category-defining product from scratch,
leveraging our massive existing customer base and IP to
deliver personalized, role-specific AI use cases. Our MVP
already showed 10x adoption results in initial pilots, now
we’re building the engine to scale it to the world.

The Challenge

This is a high-speed, greenfield environment. In your first
6 months, you will:

- Architect for Scale: Transition our MVP into a robust,
  scalable production system. You’ll design and operate AWS
  workloads where "good enough" isn't an option.
- Infrastructure as an Accelerator: Build and maintain the
  Terraform modules and CI/CD pipelines that allow the squad
  to ship daily without friction..
- Ship End-to-End: Move seamlessly between tweaking AWS IAM
  policies, optimizing the backend, and refining a React
  component. You aren't just building a feature; you’re
  building a venture.

Your Impact

- Product Partner: You influence product decisions by
  determining the right technical trade-offs to deliver
  customer value quickly without sacrificing long-term
  quality.
- Technical Excellence: You possess excellent technical skills
  and the ability to uplift other engineers, making a
  significant impact in your squad and beyond.
- Infrastructure Ownership: You will provide reliable
  estimates for complex infra tasks, proactively monitor
  system performance, and use operational data to improve
  stability.
- Delivery Leadership: You advocate for incremental delivery
  of value and act as a team multiplier, managing your time
  to drive the most business impact.
- Mentorship: You help less experienced squadmates become
  better engineers through mentoring, pairing, and high-
  quality code reviews.

Operating Principles in Action

- Solve for Customer Value: You don't build infra for infra's
  sake. Every code change is designed to ensure our users
  have a seamless, secure, and high-value experience.
- Drivers, Not Passengers: You are an owner. You don't wait
  for a detailed spec or permissions to fix an
  infrastructure bottleneck; you lead the solution and bring
  the squad with you.
- Be Decisive, Even in Ambiguity: In a greenfield environment,
  you are comfortable launching "imperfect" solutions to
  test and learn, course-correcting quickly without blame.
- AI to Deliver Outcomes: You treat AI as our engine. You are
  excited about using tools like Cursor or Claude to
  accelerate your own development and enhance the platform’s
  capabilities.

What We Are Looking For

- The Builder Mindset: You have a track record of building
  production systems from scratch (typically 5+ years, but
  we welcome strong candidates with equivalent experience).
- Excited about working on greenfield projects where you have
  designed and operated AWS workloads and maintained
  Terraform modules
- AWS & IAC Mastery: Deep experience with AWS (IAM, VPC,
  EC2/Lambda) and Terraform. You understand how to make
  infrastructure an asset, not a blocker.
- Full-Stack Flexibility: You are a generalist at heart.
  You’re happy writing TypeScript/React one hour and
  debugging an AWS deployment the next.
- Strategic Communication: You can explain complex
  architectural trade-offs to both technical and non-
  technical stakeholders.

What We Are Not Looking For

- Pure Specialists: If you only want to work on "the backend"
  or "the infra," you’ll be frustrated here. We ship as a
  unit.
- Corporate Speed: We operate like a startup. If you prefer
  long planning cycles and rigid specs over rapid iteration,
  this isn't the role for you.
- Passive Collaborators: We don't have a "throw it over the
  wall" culture. If you see a problem, you own the fix.

Note: You don't need to check every single box to apply. If
you're a strong Full Stack engineer who is excited about AWS
but still mastering Terraform, we’d still love to hear from
you. We value the 'Driver' mindset and a willingness to
learn above a perfect checklist.

Benefits

- Time off - 27 days holiday, plus 5 additional days off: 1
  life event day, 2 volunteer days, 2 company-wide wellbeing
  days (M-Powered Weekend) and 8 bank holidays per year
- Health & Wellness- private medical Insurance with Bupa, a
  medical cashback scheme, life insurance, gym membership &
  wellness resources through Wellhub and access to Spill -
  all in one mental health support
- Hybrid work offering - for most roles we collaborate in the
  office three days per week with the exception of Coaches
  and Instructors who collaborate in the office once a month
- Work-from-anywhere scheme - you'll have the opportunity to
  work from anywhere, up to 10 days per year
- Space to connect: Beyond the desk, we make time for weekly
  catch-ups, seasonal celebrations, and have a kitchen
  that’s always stocked!

Our Commitment to Diversity, Equity and Inclusion

We’re an equal opportunities employer. And proud of it.
Every applicant and employee is afforded the same
opportunities regardless of race, colour, ancestry,
religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age,
citizenship, marital status, disability, gender, gender
identity or expression, or veteran status. This will never
change. Read our Equality, Diversity & Inclusion policy
here.

Our Commitment to Safeguarding

Multiverse is committed to safeguarding and promoting the
welfare of our learners. We expect all employees to share
this commitment and adhere to our Safeguarding Policy, our
Prevent Policy and all other Multiverse company policies.
Successful applicants will be required to undertake at least
a Basic check via the Disclosure Barring Service (DBS).

For roles that will involve a Regulated Activity, successful
applicants must also undergo an Enhanced DBS check,
including a Children’s Barred List check and a Prohibition
Order check. Roles involving Regulated Activity may interact
with vulnerable groups, therefore are exempt from the
Rehabilitation of Offenders Act 1974 meaning applicants are
required to declare any convictions, cautions, reprimands,
and final warnings.

Providing false information is an offence and could result
in the application being rejected or summary dismissal if
the applicant has been selected, and possible referral to
the police and the DBS.
responsibilities: Architect and transition the MVP into a robust, scalable production system on AWS
Build and maintain Terraform modules and CI/CD pipelines for rapid squad delivery
Ship end-to-end features spanning AWS infrastructure, backend services, and React frontends
Influence product decisions by making the right technical trade-offs for customer value
Monitor system performance and use operational data to improve stability
Mentor less experienced engineers through pairing and code reviews
Advocate for incremental delivery of value and act as a team multiplier
Use AI tools like Cursor and Claude to accelerate development and enhance platform capabilities
use_cases: Personalized, role-specific AI use cases for workforce upskilling
AI adoption platform delivering measurable productivity improvements for enterprise learners
Scaling an AI-driven learning platform to 1,500+ partner companies
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is for a full-stack and infrastructure engineer on
the "Adoption AI Team" at an EdTech company. The engineer
builds and maintains the platform infrastructure (AWS,
Terraform, CI/CD), backend, and frontend — enabling the AI
product to exist — but does not directly build, train, fine-
tune, or deploy AI/ML models. AI is described as the
product's engine, but the role focuses on infra and full-
stack engineering around it.
